song.title: Jesus Thy Blood and Righteousness
song.lyrics: [v1] Jesus, Thy blood and righteousness My beauty are, my glorious dress; Midst flaming worlds in these arrayed, With joy shall I lift up my head. [v2] Bold shall I stand in Thy great day, For who aught to my charge shall lay? Fully absolved by these I am, From sin and fear, from guilt and shame. [v3] Lord, I believe Thy precious blood, Which, at the mercy seat of God, Forever doth for sinners plead, For me, e’en for my soul, was shed. [v4] Lord, I believe were sinners more Than sands upon the ocean shore, Thou hast for all a ransom paid, For all a full redemption made. [v5] This spotless robe the same appears, When ruined nature sinks in years; No age can change its glorious hue, Its glory is forever new. [v6] Thou God of power, Thou God of love, Let all Thy saints Thy mercy prove; Their beauty this, their glorious dress, Jesus the Lord, our Righteousness.
